data.description: Physics-Informed Neural Networks with Unscented Kalman Filter for Sensorless Joint Torque Estimation in Humanoid Robots cites or references CoorDex: Coordinating Body and Hand Priors for Continuous Dexterous Humanoid Loco-Manipulation.
Humanoid Whole-Body Badminton via Multi-Stage Reinforcement Learning cites or references CoorDex: Coordinating Body and Hand Priors for Continuous Dexterous Humanoid Loco-Manipulation.
CoorDex: Coordinating Body and Hand Priors for Continuous Dexterous Humanoid Loco-Manipulation uses or builds on Scaled Dot-Product Self-Attention.
